---
title: "About Me"
---

I am a Southern Utah University student currently working on my Bachelors in Math with an Actuarial emphasis. I also plan on getting a minor in Computer Science and Finance. I enjoy doing data analysis in ways that lead to solving a real world problem. I also do some light game modding in my spare time. If you need to contact me about a project or anything else, you can reach me here:

*email:* [nankervissamuel\@gmail.com](https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/#inbox?compose=DmwnWstxRXmfBbdwZbTdZHTTQSXLkpdPXRhTNcVnDCqDWDPdcLSLXslctbBKJXZxRdpCLhdJPkRg)

*Phone:* +1-435-559-1439

*Linkedin:* [Samuel Nankervis](https://www.linkedin.com/in/samuel-nankervis-b207873b1/)

*Github:* [Samuel-Nankervis](https://github.com/Samuel-Nankervis)
